$comment: External JSON Schemas vendored under this directory. Refresh by running `uv run --project agentic-coding/transpiler refresh-schemas`. Each entry declares: filename (local), source URL, kind ('direct' or 'zod-converted'), and an optional source_subpath used for zod-converted entries to identify which TypeScript schema to convert.

schemas.description: Anthropic MCPB / Desktop Extensions manifest schema (Draft 07). Used to validate mcpb/manifest.json and the manifest embedded in mcpb/ash.mcpb.
OpenCode (sst/opencode) config schema (Draft 2020-12). Used to validate opencode/opencode.json.
Amazon Q Developer CLI agent.json schema (Draft 07). Used to validate amazonq/agent.json.

Continue.dev config.yaml schema, converted from the canonical Zod schema in the continuedev/continue repo. Used to validate continue/.continue/mcpServers/*.yaml and continue/.continue/rules/*.md (the latter only structurally — Continue's rule frontmatter is not Zod-typed).
